case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANICAL CORP.) VS. MARTHA REBECA RIVERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT MARTHA REBECA RIVERA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED DEC-10-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, MARTHA REBECA
